particulars.description: The land edged blue on the plan annexed to schedule 3 of the charge document in respect of:. Part of the freehold property registered at hm land registry with title number WK388313 known as 147 tunnel road and land on the north west side of tunnel road, galley common, nuneaton (CV10 9NW); and. The whole of the freehold property known as 155 tunnel road, galley common, nuneaton (CV10 9NW) registered at hm land registry with title number WK143419.

The freehold property known as land at the back of 91-99 woodlands road, bedworth registered at hm land registry with title number WK447236; and the freehold property known as 99 woodlands road, bedworth CV12 0AD registered at hm land registry with title number WK370353.
The freehold property known as land on the south side of 4 main street, norton juxta twycross CV9 3QA registered at hm land registry with title number LT459315.

The freehold property of A.R.cartwright limited comprised in: the transfer of part of the freehold land being land on the north side of orton lane, twycross, atherstone registered at hm land registry with title number LT467254 dated 28 april 2021 from the crown estate commissioners on behalf of her majesty the queen to A.R.cartwright limited; the transfer of part of the freehold land being land on the north side of orton lane, twycross, atherstone registered at hm land registry with title number LT467254 dated 18 june 2021 from the crown estate commissioners on behalf of her majesty the queen to A.R.cartwright limited; and the transfer of part of the freehold land being lea grange farm, orton on the hill, atherstone CV9 3NP registered at hm land registry with title number LT490626 dated 18 june 2021 from michael dawson hayward to A.R.cartwright limited.
The freehold property known as land adjoining laburnum cottage, high street, stoke golding, nuneaton registered at the land registry with title number LT362218.

The land edged red on a transfer dated 21 december 2018 made between (1) robert arthur steele (acting by his attorney jill margaret steele) and jill margaret steele and (2) A.R.cartwright limited forming part of the land registry title number DY64840 and the freehold property known as land on the east side of poplars farm, 47 moira road, overseal, swadlincote DE12 6JB registered at the land registry with title number DY489439.

The land shown edged red on the plan attached to the legal charge at schedule 4 which at 26 june 2018 forms part of the freehold property known as 147 tunnel road and land on the north west side of tunnel road, galley common, nuneaton CV10 9NW registered at the land registry with title number WK388313.
The freehold property known as land at the back of 59 birmingham road, ansley, nuneaton CV10 9PS registered at the land registry with title number WK425809.

The land shown edged red on the plan attached to the legal charge at schedule 4 which at 23 january 2017 forms part of the freehold property registered at the land registry with title number WK425809 and part of the freehold property registered at the land registry with title number WK249247.

The freehold property known as land adjoining coventry canal, bridge street, coton, nuneaton registered at the land registry with title number WK483707; the freehold property known as land on the north side of bull ring, nuneaton registered at the land registry with title number WK224496; and the freehold property known as land lying to the north of bridge street, coton, nuneaton registered at the land registry with title number WK448075.
